description: Customer service has always been responsive. They are good about communicating upcoming changes and down time. Overall it is an easy, simple scheduling and timeclock tool.
author: Jennifer S.
pros: What I like most about Makeshift is that it is easy to export data for import into ADP.
cons: What I like least about Makeshift is the inability to have a department where managers can clock in and out without them being able to edit their own time, the inability to view an overall timesheet for an employee, the inability to have a good system for tracking absences.

description: Makeshift has made it easier to confirm employees ADP schedules, it has taken the guess work out of shifts posted as worked on ADP. Makeshift schedule shows who was on shift, it communicates this to ADP so I do not have to go back to see who was on shift.
author: Mary M.
pros: It is very user friendly, I am able to see my staff schedule both weekly and daily, which allows me to see in real time who is currently scheduled to work.
cons: It can be difficult to post a shift using my phone, I find the amount of fields to be filled out can be time consuming. I don't have the drag and post option that is available when creating shifts on my computer.

description: Won't work with us to make a file that is easily brought over to Payroll. I have to manipulate a spreadsheet which can easily cause errors.
author: Stacey F.
pros: I'm not sure what I like about the software.
cons: Not being to look at an employee as a whole. You can only see a person's time only in the department that you are in, even though they have hours worked in another department.

review_title: MakeShift Has Been an Exceptional Employee Scheduling and Tracking Tool
author: Clinton A.
pros: For proper employee tracking and scheduling, MakeShift is the most reliable software to consider. MakeShift has been reliable and easy to use.
cons: MakeShift meets our needs. We have zero complains about MakeShift.

review_title: User friendly and Easy to Use
description: I absolutely love using MakeShift to distribute my teams schedule. They can see shift changes in real time and immediately receive schedules when they are published. This eliminates all the confusion we had in the past with team members not knowing their schedule or making weekly calls to the store to find out what shifts they are working.
author: Brandon H.
pros: Makeshift makes scheduling employees a very simple process and it is incredibly user friendly. There are many platform features available to manage several different workforce tasks for business. As we integrate with ADP we use makeshift for scheduling to provide easy access for our store teams to see their schedule and request days off seamlessly without sending out spreadsheets or printing paper schedules.
cons: I would like to see improvement with MakeShift as it concerns ADP integration. There are a small number of technical issues with the integration from time to time. Specifically, I would like for MakeShift to potentially display a "vacation" shift when full time associates request paid time off in ADP. As of now, MakeShift will only give you a shift sync error if you unintentionally schedule a shift on a day with a PTO request.

description: Overall experience is very good from the product itself, to the online support.
author: Susan L.
pros: Integration was fairy easy, we had lot's of support. Features are easy to use and customize to what our company needs.
cons: One of the features I would like to see changed is when an employee puts in their availability it shows up on their schedule but if a shift is requested on this day it does not reflect their availability and hours outside of the availability are still scheduled in. I have also found shifts have been put into the wrong schedule from that employee that requested and was granted the shift.

review_title: Very simplem easy to use and deploy
author: Denese Kyle S.
pros: MakeShift has greatly helped me improve my scheduling experience - it is very easy to use and deploy. We use MakeShift mostly for our contractual employees and contractors, I use this to create and distribute schedule from weeks, months, x number of days and it is very user friendly to use. This way - I am able to see staff schedule easily and real time based on my preference.Mobile access, real time updates, scheduling, communication and integration with ADP are some of my favorite things about this software.
cons: I would like to see MakeShift make more improvements in terms of ADP - but it's already doing great and does it job well. There are quite few glitches but doesn't really affect productivity. I would also like to be able to leave a comment when I make a bid/trade on a shift.

review_title: I Like the Effectiveness of MakeShift: It Is Highly Reliable
author: Rubani K.
pros: MakeShift has been a powerful that has been making employee scheduling super effective. MakeShift has been so reliable.
cons: MakeShift is flawless. I like the reliability of MakeShift.

review_title: MakeShift Has Been a Powerful Tool that Makes Scheduling Processes Efficient
author: Chrisarn M.
pros: With MakeShift, we are able to conduct employee scheduling efficiently. MakeShift has been so reliable to use.
cons: MakeShift is so amazing. I have nos issues with MakeShift.

description: Makeshift has been great in helping me transition to a "work from home" world. I love that I can clock in and out of work with the ease of tapping a screen. Brilliant.
author: Peeka T.
pros: So easy to clock in and clock out of work from anywhere. I can see all the hours I have worked whether it be in the past, or same day. So easy to use this software!
cons: I wish the app would automatically load in the classic view when I log in from my phone.

author: Diane O.
pros: Easy to update employee schedule, and keep track of daily requirements for staff
cons: none that I can mention or think of at this point in time

description: Not only is it easy for me to use but my Team members like it as well. They download the Makeshift app and can see their schedules with a click of a button. Very easy for them as well.
author: Daniel R.
pros: I like the fact that it is easy to use. I am not a computer genius but this was easy to learn and use.
cons: I haven't found anything that I do not like about this software. I use it with ease every day and find it makes my job of scheduling very easy.

author: Brenna W.
pros: Easy implementation and updates. Easy for our staff to use.
cons: Some challenges with respect to scheduling in two different departments

description: Makeshift is a great platform for us to build our schedules in the store. It's also great that it updates and changes in real time when changes are made.
author: Robert S.
pros: Being able to import users from ADP. Drag and drop scheduling. Repeating previous weeks schedules.
cons: Color coding shifts that are not used on the shift template in the weekly schedule. Color coding manager and assistant manager shifts.

description: I’ve been a user for 3 months now and it has proven to be hassle-free and efficient.
author: Tiffany J.
pros: This software is quick and easy access, with it being accessible in whatever device you use. I’ve used it on different phones and phone types and it syncs perfectly.
cons: As I would highly recommend it, I would prefer the app notifies me whenever someone wants to exchange shifts with me, though it does notify me when a shift is available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helps me be always on time
author: Kevin P.
pros: The simplicity of it. Its super easy to make a shift.
cons: I wish there was an option to notify my boss that I have changed my availability for certain day or week.

author: Jim S.
pros: The schedule templates are very easy and useful
cons: For they way I use the product I don't have any issues.

author: Maureen N.
pros: Easy to use, user friendly. Great way to be able to keep track of when your shifts are and if you want to switch shifts and orlick up.
cons: Really there isn't anything that I don't like about it.

author: Michelle D.
pros: I like the ease of bidding on available shifts and having a snapshot of my schedule
cons: I don't like how you have to maneuver all over to get where you want to go, not as user friendly as it could be

review_title: Easy and great scheduling calendar to use
author: Colette P.
pros: easy to use and laid out well. I like how the calendar is easy to read and shows the shifts you are going to work with color.
cons: To be honest I like everything about the makeshift app, no cons.

author: Patsy D.
pros: Ease of use. No need for phone calls. Can see changes in real time
cons: No comment as it is easy to use. No concerns from from my end.

author: Taylore S.
pros: Its just an easy app to keep track of my shifts and easy to schedule people in
cons: Not much to say here. There is not much that I dont like. Overall a good app

author: Lorne W.
pros: Its easy to use and easy to train our store managers on how to use the software.
cons: I would like to see a different layout on the schedule view. I believe there are ways to make the scheduling even easier by allowing your templates to already have a designation attached to it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Norman B.
pros: Ease of use , real-time information , integration with mobile devices
cons: Haven't had anything to complain about to date .

author: Naomi F.
pros: Easy and functional use, extremely easy access!
cons: I didn't have any cons, functional use, great service!
